sections.name: Graduale
lines: Behold, a great priest, who in his days pleased God.
V. There was not found the like to him, who kept the law of the Most High. Alleluia, alleluia.
V. You are a priest forever, according to the order of Melchisedec. Alleluia.

sections.name: Offertorium
lines: I have found David, my servant; with My holy oil I have anointed him, that My hand may be always with him, and that My arm may make him strong.
